source.description: The string that must appear in `(BAND)` placeholder. If unset, defaults to the band name.

bandIndex.description: The index of band in 1-based numbering.

noData.description: You can define noData either per band or per collection, but not both.

aliases.description:
An optional list of alias names that can be used instead of the band name in the evalscript.
Only used in certain specific collections and not settable by the user.
